channel.title: Projects on Yuntong Zhang
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Yuntong Zhang

item.title: Telegram bot - Ramsay123
item.description: This project can be found on Github and Devpost. Background As college students, eating out may not always be the viable option to enjoy a scrumptious yet healthy and affordable meal. This bot aims to introduce and recommend dishes tailored to user’s dietary preference, so that users can discover new food to prepare in their own kitchen, or head to the nearest restaurants and expand their palate. Introduction Ramsay123 is a telegram bot, which interacts with users via customized keyboards.
